assertions.text: Agent recognizes this request as out of scope within 1-2 sentences
assertions.evidence: Baseline spent 8 tool calls and ~119 seconds trying to check Android SDK, emulator, adb, Android Studio, and project files before concluding it was not possible. Did not recognize scope boundary.

assertions.text: Agent explicitly mentions mobile-dev as the correct agent for Android emulator tasks
assertions.evidence: Baseline never mentioned mobile-dev. Instead provided generic Android Studio installation instructions.

assertions.text: Agent does NOT execute any xcrun simctl or maestro commands
Agent does NOT attempt to install Android SDK, emulator, or any Android-related tools
assertions.evidence: Checked for Android tools but did not attempt to install them.
